creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
I thought I had added Cc to the freebsd-security, but I hadn't seen
the PR in the list.  So I am bouncing this message to the freebsd-security.

Thu, Nov 13, 2008 at 11:00:11AM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=128837
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [vuxml] net-mgmt/net-snmp and net-mgmt/net-snmp53: CVE-2008-4309
> >Arrival-Date:   Thu Nov 13 11:00:11 UTC 2008
-- 
Eygene
 _                ___       _.--.   #
 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual   
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook 
    {_.-``-'         {_/            #
